name: Grilled Angel Food Cake with Nectarines & Blueberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the grill and cover to build intense heat.
2. Remove nectarine pits and slice each one into 6 pieces.
3. In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, lemon zest, and lemon juice.
4. Place 6 nectarine slices on a skewer and place them on the grill.
5. Cook for 5 minutes, then turn and baste with glaze. Continue cooking and basting for another 7 minutes.
6. When the fruit is nearly done, toast cake slices on a cooler part of the grill, turning once.
7. Serve toasted cake with grilled nectarines and blueberries.
Calories: 284; Protein: 6g; Fat: 0.7g; Carbohydrates: 63g; Cholesterol: 0; Sodium: 175mg; Fiber: 5g
